name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Muslim Ban 2.0 temporarily halted
body:
Create a different kind of registry that lifts all of us up.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
A federal judge has temporarily halted the White House's second iteration of its racist Muslim ban. But we know the Trump Administration will fight the ruling as part of its repeated attempts to sow division amongst us.
As a candidate, Donald Trump pledged to create an illegal Muslim registry. We think it's time to create a _different_ kind of registry that lifts all of us up: a nationwide, grassroots movement of people who will stand up and speak out when our immigrant and Muslim sisters and brothers are under attack.
**[ADD YOUR NAME to our rapid response list and we'll let you know when there is urgent action needed to protect Muslims and immigrants in your neighborhood.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003fd/1798372852/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/ourresistance-alerts-muslim-and-immigrant-communities?source=em170315-full")**
This cruel and inhumane executive order bars immigrants who have fled some of the war-torn, drought-stricken countries in the world. The first immigrants who came to America fled religious persecution, but Donald Trump and his advisors want to use the religion of today's immigrants as a measuring stick.
The Statue of Liberty reads,"Give me your tired, your poor. Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free." There is no qualifier based on religion or country of origin. If Donald Trump wants to register some of us, then our job is to build a grassroots registry of people who will take action to stop this administration's racist policies from taking effect. **[Join our rapid response list to hear when there is urgent action needed locally to counter the travel ban and other policies harmful to Muslims and immigrants.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003fd/1798372852/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/ourresistance-alerts-muslim-and-immigrant-communities?source=em170315-full")**
It is our job to resist. It is our job to say loud and clear: not on our watch. Not in my community. Not in my movement. **We must stand together for our values, or else we stand for nothing.**
**[Let us know we can count on you to stand with Muslim and immigrant communities. Sign up today for our rapid response alert list, and we'll let you know when there's an urgent action in your area.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003fd/1798372852/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/ourresistance-alerts-muslim-and-immigrant-communities?source=em170315-full")**
Thank you for standing with us for principle and purpose.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003fd/1798372852/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/ourresistance-alerts-muslim-and-immigrant-communities?source=em170315-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003fa/1798372852/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003fb/1798372852/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a5a/43f17890/dee6f5a2/620003f8/1798372852/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 3/16/2017. |

**FEATURED**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f6546fd09701fee3d0bf95f7027c36349cd671cfc87e0214a2300be93a1db95d803e4d63e3c94da8416cfee765d5619d993f)

Today, the Office of Management and Budget released the President's FY 2018 budget blueprint to make America great again.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f654bf90be67caa1eeb1c9915686ab1d528ac1a37ce21c4091eb094423e73d8d9f2312c18a86f76fdf0d4d678233c19b91ef)

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
President Donald J. Trump will welcome the Taoiseach of Ireland to the White House today. This visit will further strengthen the close economic and cultural ties between our two nations as we work together in areas of mutual interest.

**GET INVOLVED**
President Trump is committed to making sure all Americans have the opportunity to secure a good job.
[Support Getting Americans Back to Work. Sign the Petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f654d3af44fbdb78bf55f8dcdac6c06fcd19d13523796a7a476ae74c24f4217296d3d3a1fc6dfb22a402a3c240cd6c9f8925)

**FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f6541d576d8e5b591a39162dcaf585e58215deadd616d26c6b2cc35413a721efab78e08f2e3735279eabd01c500543a92fdc)

**OVAL OFFICE HIGHLIGHTS**
President Trump gives remarks at American Center for Mobility in Detroit, MI: Buy American and Hire American.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f654e4c2d04d3c54022e6a6d235938ea979dd5b9f83c68688b0209cb158bfdc91b2124a09c27e24ad6fa702f75c24d7e37b4)

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f65417f5caac776bf1003fd33ec6519ccacfb901d8652772b4ac8a932ef62886e79e9e9199dd856ff4f63edf9ffa1918abec)

President Trump makes remarks at Andrew Jackson's Hermitage
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f6544ce92b8b42e3612bcabcb2e7e0712e843e870223daca55ab918a0fb0d5affb53615777bd0d0f9afc7012036c0c8f62a3)

**WHITE HOUSE UPDATES**
**Photo of the Day:**

The White House's 18 acres of grounds covered in snow. (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

Obamacare is imploding. Hear Mrs. Couey's Obamacare disaster story:

**PRESS ROOM**
Read yesterday's press gaggle [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f654acc8d4a3352f51d82c6bae52686ba72d8f449319a1736939709fe57e7106d08a7ac75f764544e0387d0ff6edd9f62517)

Today's press briefing will take place at 2:00 P.M. EST in the White House Briefing Room with Press Secretary Sean Spicer and OMB Director Mulvaney. Watch it [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f654ee22c227c950ebe0b33292d4dc1741208d2a6fc88fbcfb26defd2afd510e0d2863b4b39fa4932deecff766bcf7c33882)

**PRESIDENT TRUMP'S SCHEDULE**
* 10:30AM: President Trump holds a bilateral meeting with the Taoiseach of Ireland
* 12:05PM: President Trump participates in and makes remarks at the Friends of Ireland luncheon
* 5:45PM: President Trump welcomes the Taoiseach and Mrs. Kenny of Ireland to the White House
* 6:00PM: President Trump makes remarks at the St. Patrick's Day Reception

**NEWS REPORTS**
* _New York Times:_ "The Health Secretary, on the Republican Bill"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f65437a4c85cab71206afdc7a2fef98d6f8f2bdf14436a5269b26ece168c49d020e0833bd4c5b3c8d52e13d479fd42ce914d)

* _Daily Signal:_ "RSC Chair Talks ‘Hopeful Meeting’ With Pence on Obamacare"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9109cb79d2b0f654df9da8feb0fc3b98f07542296236524c93d19ca4b4972bb33dab0306bd7e2351f8df0e43b2196781c7b8f93467a5a098)
* _The Wall Street Journal:_ "The Health Bill’s Fiscal Bonus"

* _Time:_ "This Is How You Can Attend President Trump's First White House Easter Egg Roll for Free"

name: DNC War Room
subject: re: taking back the House in 2018
body:
We need a Congress that will hold Trump accountable. **Pitch in whatever you can to help Democrats take back the House in 2018:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb0c/4067b0a/2dbd174c5/7e7fa137/248043723/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170316_dnc_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb0c/4067b0a/2dbd174c5/7e7fa13d/248043723/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170316_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb0c/4067b0a/2dbd174c5/7e7fa13a/248043723/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170316_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb0c/4067b0a/2dbd174c5/7e7fa13b/248043723/VEsHBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170316_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb0c/4067b0a/2dbd174c5/7e7fa138/248043723/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170316_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20Headquarters?=
subject: This is the America First budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Sign on to support the President. |

Friend, This morning, President Trump released the America First budget, which promises to make our nation a better, safer, and stronger place for generations to come. Here’s how he will do that: Department of Veterans Affairs +10.2% in funding Department of Defense +10.0% in funding Department of Homeland Security +7.3% in funding Environmental Protection Agency - 31% in funding President Trump is delivering on promises to strengthen our military, build a wall securing our country, and provide more resources for our veterans who risk their lives to protect us, while cutting BILLIONS from liberal programs. Friend, add your name to the official petition supporting President Trump and his America First budget. ADD YOUR NAME Friend, the Fake News and Democrats in Congress will try to stop this budget every step of the way, which is why your support is so important to the President right now. This is a budget for the American people, and without your help we won’t be able to cut through the noise. We need your help to support the budget that puts AMERICA FIRST. ADD YOUR NAME President Trump ran on a promise to make America stronger. He ran on a promise to put our great nation first, and now we have a blueprint to make it happen. Friend, add your name today to support the America First budget. It’s time to Make America Great Again! Thank you, Trump Headquarters
ADD YOUR NAME

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: The only sentence you need to read about Trump's budget:
body:
This is Trump's 2018 budget "blueprint."
---
**Add your name to oppose Trump's disastrous budget proposal:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc2_nd")**
There are a lot of details to parse through in the budget blueprint Donald Trump released this morning, but you can get the gist of it from one sentence:

Donald Trump is cutting Meals on Wheels, a program that delivers meals to senior citizens in need, to pay for his border wall.

**Stand with Democrats to oppose Trump's disastrous budget. Sign on right now:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc2_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb02/4067b0a/2db8b39d4/7e7faefb/2766969176/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb02/4067b0a/2db8b39d4/7e7faef8/2766969176/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb02/4067b0a/2db8b39d4/7e7faef9/2766969176/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb02/4067b0a/2db8b39d4/7e7fae86/2766969176/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170316_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170316_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:

Contribute $10 today for a chance to win an all-expenses paid trip to Washington, D.C. on March 21st for a dinner with President Trump. Hurry – we’ll open this contest to the public soon. Enter today for a chance to have dinner with President Trump. Enter Now

Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, visit here. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Monday, February 27, 2017 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, March 17, 2017 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, March 17, 2017. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor or similar transportation, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the District of Columbia hotels, with an approximate retail value of $275; two (2) tickets to the 22nd Annual March Dinner, with an approximate retail value of $2,000; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $3,075. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $3,075. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First Street, S.E., Washington, D.C. 20003. name: Cory Booker
subject: Fired up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| Friend, I'm still fired up from the protests I've seen nationwide, with folks standing up for women's rights and against Trump's unlawful and misguided Muslim ban. The energy and enthusiasm I've seen across the country have been incredible.

That energy is exactly what we need if we're going to show President Trump that Americans aren't standing with him. But I'll need your help, friend. [**A donation of $3 or more will help ensure that Florida Democrats have the resources they need to protect the progress we 've made in the last eight years.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+A+donation+of+ask+or+more+will+help+ensu&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617&refcode=+em031617")

With President Trump and his allies in the GOP moving to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, privatize social safety net programs, and roll back our progress on civil rights, we can't afford to lose any ground.

[**friend, please rush your donation right away.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMEfriend+please+rush+your+donatio&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617&refcode=+em031617")

_If you've saved your payment information in ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Donate $3 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b25b/1a5213b3/76d50022/718bae42/1776610888/VEsF/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617")
[Donate $25 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b25b/1a5213b3/76d50022/718baebd/1776610888/VEsC/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617")
[Donate $50 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b25b/1a5213b3/76d50022/718baebc/1776610888/VEsD/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617")
[Donate $100 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b25b/1a5213b3/76d50022/718baebf/1776610888/VEsA/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617")
[Or donate another amount.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617&refcode=+em031617")**
Listen, there's an old saying I've always appreciated: if you want to go fast, go alone, but if you want to go far, go together. If we stand together, we can overcome any challenge that comes our way. We cannot back down now.

[**Please, rush a donation of $10 or more before FDP 's critical deadline and help us fight back against Trump's extreme agenda!**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-booker?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=8+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+rush+a+donation+of+ask+o&utm_campaign=em031617&source=em031617&refcode=+em031617")

Thanks for all you do.

Cory
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Will you be a citizen cosponsor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Women deserve to be able to make health care choices without interference from the government. But in recent years, we've seen a broad effort to restrict women's health care options, from state legislatures working to limit access to abortion care, to the new Republican health care bill which defunds Planned Parenthood at the national level.

That's why I've joined my fellow Virginia Senator Mark Warner and our colleagues Tammy Baldwin and Richard Blumenthal to introduce the Women's Health Protection Act. Our bill seeks to stop this troubling trend by prohibiting the burdensome laws that Republican legislators in many states, including Virginia, are trying to pass to impose limits on reproductive health services.

I am pleased that 40 senators and 110 House members have cosponsored the Women's Health Protection Act. **Will you join us as a citizen cosponsor, Derek?[Add your name to show your support for the Women's Health Protection Act.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MtEQc9dxGs1CYtcKU3pXGgti%2FDw8%2BywK)**

I wish this bill weren't necessary, 44 years after _Roe v. Wade_ and nearly a year after _Whole Woman 's Health v. Hellerstedt_. But the truth is, opponents of a woman's right to a safe and legal abortion are unrelenting. Across the country, state legislatures continue to pass unconstitutional laws that seek to deceive women and restrict their health care -- such as laws requiring doctors to perform medically unnecessary tests or subjecting women to onerous waiting periods. And now that Republicans are trying to defund Planned Parenthood nationally, we need to step up our defense.

**[Will you join me and my colleagues in standing up for women by becoming a citizen cosponsor of the Women's Health Protection Act?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TsLcr4CbypvWklTnZmnUMwti%2FDw8%2BywK)**

Thank you,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=d5m5n4qUmvXe4GiUsGkBGgti%2FDw8%2BywK)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wpj96ireVD7O0GodGFf97Qti%2FDw8%2BywK).
---

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Work with dignity
body:
#
Friends -
When I was a kid and I had to go pick up groceries for my mother, I used red, off-color green, or brown paper. And I distinctly remember getting out of line and pretending I had forgotten something when I saw anyone I knew from church or school at the store, because I didn't want them to know my family was at times a food insecure household.
That shame and humiliation runs deep -- it's still hard for me to write about, even today. But I'm going to swallow my pride and talk with y'all about it, because it matters in this campaign and in the state of Florida. Just yesterday, the Florida House Appropriations Committee voted to cut food assistance for 229,000 Floridians, including 157,000 children and 44,000 seniors and those with a disability.
[**If you believe that Florida should continue to stand by families who need help putting food on the table, add your name to our petition to stop these cuts now.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cc/9e00690/496d0df0/24035de8/3670725230/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/food-assistance-cuts?source=em170316-foodassistance-b")
I learned at a very young age that a whole lot of people would think that my value, and my family's value, as human beings was somehow less because at times we needed food assistance. That even when my parents worked full time, folks would demonize them as lazy because we needed help.
Now I know that although my parents had jobs and a strong work ethic, neither of them had work with dignity -- work where they were valued as human beings, and compensated with a living wage. And that's something a lot of folks in Florida lack today.
Governor Rick Scott talks a whole lot about how he's brought jobs to Florida, but he hasn't brought work with dignity to Florida. He hasn't done what's necessary to make ensure that these jobs pay people enough money to survive and thrive. Instead, he has continued to perpetuate a careless attitude for working Floridians, the same carelessness that made me so ashamed to be food insecure as a kid. And that is unacceptable.
We don't need to shame or demonize people who are struggling to get by -- what we need to do is provide better opportunities for folks to work and get ahead. We need to bring work with dignity to this state -- we need jobs for folks that don't require them to have three jobs just to make ends meet. We need to provide a safety net for families who need it most, like mine did when I was a kid. And when we win back the Governor's office in 2018, we're going to provide a chance for people to earn a living with dignity.
[**Add your name to our petition now to help us stop these cruel, unnecessary cuts to Florida families.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cc/9e00690/496d0df0/24035de8/3670725230/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/food-assistance-cuts?source=em170316-foodassistance-b")
Together, we're going to ensure that everyone in Florida is valued as human beings should be, no matter their job title or the amount in their bank account.
Bring it home,

Andrew

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cc/9e00690/496d0df0/24035de8/3670725230/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/food-assistance-cuts?source=em170316-foodassistance-b")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cc/9e00690/496d0df0/24035deb/3670725230/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cc/9e00690/496d0df0/24035dea/3670725230/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cc/9e00690/496d0df0/24035ded/3670725230/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
